headline: Israel FLOOR CONFIRMATION at 0.0 / Critical — floor sustained. New conduct-documentation: (1) MSF report May 7-8: 'manufactured malnutrition crisis' in Gaza — more than 50% of women cared for at two hospitals between June 2025 and Jan 2026 suffered malnutrition during pregnancy; 90% of babies born under those conditions premature; 84% low birth weight; 25% of mothers remained malnourished at delivery. (2) Ceasefire violations passed 2,000+ since Oct 10 2025 entry into force; 756 Palestinians killed since ceasefire, 2,100+ injured (Gaza Health Ministry tracking via OCHA OPT). (3) UNRWA blocked since March 2025 — 14-month structural humanitarian-access restriction sustained. (4) NEW INT-DIMENSION ACCOUNTABILITY SIGNAL: Hungary policy reversal — Magyar government will enforce ICC arrest warrants for Netanyahu/Gallant if they enter Hungary (reverses Orbán's non-enforcement during April 2025 Budapest visit and his ICC withdrawal announcement). This is the first major European democracy to shift from non-enforcement to enforcement during 2026, narrowing Israeli leadership's ICC-member-state travel footprint. Floor sustained; conduct documentation appended; ICC enforcement footprint contraction documented.

conduct_documentation.summary: Floor conduct documentation update — MSF manufactured malnutrition crisis report (May 7-8), 2,000+ ceasefire violations milestone, UNRWA access block continuation, AND new INT-dimension accountability signal from Hungary ICC enforcement reversal.
new_conduct_categories_this_cycle: MSF manufactured malnutrition crisis (May 7-8): 'The malnutrition crisis is entirely manufactured' per MSF. More than 50% of women cared for at two MSF hospitals between June 2025 - Jan 2026 suffered malnutrition during pregnancy; 25% remained malnourished at delivery; 90% of babies born under those conditions premature; 84% low birth weight. Direct documented health harm to infants and pregnant women from systematic aid restriction.

Ceasefire violations milestone (2,000+): Since Oct 10 2025 ceasefire entry into force, 2,000+ violations documented; 756 Palestinians killed since ceasefire; 2,100+ injured (Gaza Health Ministry via OCHA OPT). Aid trucks averaging 145/day vs. 600 agreed.

ICC enforcement footprint contraction (Hungary, April-May 2026): Magyar incoming government policy reversal on ICC arrest-warrant enforcement is the first major European democracy 2026 shift from non-enforcement to enforcement. Practical effect: Netanyahu/Gallant cannot travel to Hungary without arrest risk. Independent travel-footprint contraction signal.

structural_aid_restriction_categories_su.unrwa_access_block: Since March 2025 Israel has blocked UNRWA from directly bringing humanitarian personnel and aid into Gaza — 14-month structural access-restriction (UNRWA Situation Report 220 confirmation). UNRWA is the largest provider of aid, health care, and other vital services for Palestinians. Block continues.
structural_aid_restriction_categories_su.ghf_restricted_distribution: Food distribution points reduced from ~400 to 4 under Gaza Humanitarian Foundation by late May 2025. GHF distribution centres described as 'militarised and deadly, barely functioning, or open at the same time' (carry-over context).
structural_aid_restriction_categories_su.37_aid_orgs_suspended: Israeli government suspended 37 humanitarian agencies in Gaza — 'another step in weaponization of aid' (Responsible Statecraft, Arab Center DC analysis, carry-over context).

conduct_documentation.gaza_casualty_accumulation: Cumulative casualty toll since Oct 7 2023: 72,344+ killed, 172,242+ injured (carry-over from May 11; figures continue to accumulate). Airstrikes, shelling, and gunfire continue across all Gaza areas per UNRWA Situation Report 220.
conduct_documentation.icc_enforcement_footprint_contraction_an: Hungary's reversal is significant because: (a) Hungary was the only EU member state that explicitly hosted Netanyahu after the ICC warrant (April 2025 Budapest visit); (b) Orbán's ICC-withdrawal announcement was the most prominent European symbolic non-enforcement signal; (c) Magyar's stated policy returns Hungary to standard ICC member-state obligations; (d) Israeli leadership has been documented as avoiding ICC member states (skipped Davos 2026). The 2026 trajectory now is: ICC enforcement footprint expanding (Hungary returns to enforcement); ICC accountability mechanism gaining institutional integrity. This is an INT-dimension EXTERNAL accountability signal — relevant to Israel's floor record because it documents one of the few external accountability mechanisms gaining ground rather than retreating. Does NOT move composite (floor; external signal anyway).
carry_over_conduct_categories: Gaza military operations conduct (primary floor anchor)
OHCHR torture/inhumane-treatment allegations (35-individual flotilla cluster, May 8 OHCHR — unresolved)
UNCLOS jurisdiction question (April 29 maritime interception at 500 nautical miles in international waters — unanswered)
UNCAT accountability for reported mistreatment during detention — no investigation announced
conduct_documentation.floor_exit_criteria_impact: MSF manufactured-malnutrition documentation is qualitatively distinct from prior aid-restriction conduct: it documents direct health harm to infants and pregnant women with quantified clinical data (90% premature, 84% low birth weight from malnourished mothers). This is a tier-5 evidence (independent clinical observation by MSF medical teams). Combined with sustained UNRWA access block and 2,000+ ceasefire violations, floor-exit evidentiary burden compounds. Hungary ICC reversal is an external accountability signal that does not affect Israel composite directly but documents accountability-mechanism integrity gain.

key_evidence: May 7 2026 (in-window): MSF 'Gaza Death Trap' report — alarming malnutrition in Gaza; 'manufactured malnutrition crisis' framing; more than 50% of women at two MSF hospitals (June 2025 - Jan 2026) malnourished during pregnancy; 25% malnourished at delivery; 90% of babies premature; 84% low birth weight.
May 7-8 2026 (in-window): MSF accuses Israel of manufacturing malnutrition crisis (Al Jazeera, Doctors Without Borders, MSF-ME).

May 11 2026 (in-window, carry-over): UNRWA Situation Report 220 — humanitarian crisis in Gaza Strip and occupied West Bank; airstrikes, shelling, gunfire across all Gaza areas; UNRWA access block continues since March 2025 (14-month).
Ceasefire violations milestone: 2,000+ violations since Oct 10 2025 entry into force; 756 Palestinians killed since ceasefire; 2,100+ injured (Gaza Health Ministry via OCHA).

April 2026 (carry-over context, May INT-dimension signal): Hungary Magyar government policy reversal on ICC arrest-warrant enforcement — will arrest Netanyahu/Gallant if they enter Hungary. First major European democracy 2026 shift from non-enforcement to enforcement. Practical ICC-travel footprint contraction.
Aid trucks averaging 145/day vs. 600 agreed under ceasefire terms.
37 humanitarian agencies suspended by Israeli government (carry-over).

evidence.source: MSF / Doctors Without Borders — Gaza death trap: MSF report exposes Israel's campaign of total destruction
evidence.finding: MSF report finds Israel manufactured a malnutrition crisis through systematic blockade. Direct clinical data on malnourished pregnant women and premature births.

evidence.source: Al Jazeera — MSF accuses Israel of manufacturing a malnutrition crisis in Gaza
evidence.finding: Independent media documentation of MSF clinical findings; ceasefire-violation context.

evidence.source: MSF Middle East — Deliberate restriction of food and aid led to alarming malnutrition levels in Gaza
evidence.finding: MSF press release framing 'deliberate restriction' — institutional position statement.

evidence.source: Responsible Statecraft — By suspending 37 aid orgs is Israel pushing toward a final expulsion?

evidence.finding: Humanitarian crisis continuation; UNRWA access block sustained since March 2025; airstrikes/shelling/gunfire across all Gaza areas.

evidence.source: Al Jazeera — Hungary's incoming PM says Netanyahu would be arrested if he visits
evidence.finding: External INT-dimension accountability signal: Hungary policy reversal on ICC enforcement. ICC member-state footprint contraction.

math_check.validator_check: Floor maintained. New evidence does not affect composite but compounds floor-exit evidentiary burden and adds external INT-dimension accountability signal.

negativeSignals: MSF manufactured-malnutrition clinical documentation (90% premature, 84% low birth weight from malnourished mothers); 2,000+ ceasefire violations; 756 Palestinians killed since ceasefire; UNRWA access block 14-month continuation; 37 aid orgs suspended; aid trucks averaging 145/day vs. 600 agreed; 72,344+ cumulative killed; OHCHR torture/inhumane-treatment allegations (35-individual cluster) unresolved.
positiveSignals: External (not Israel-internal): Hungary ICC enforcement reversal narrows Israeli leadership ICC-member-state travel footprint, documenting external accountability mechanism strengthening rather than retreating.
sector_context: Countries floor-cluster. Israel distinguished by qualitatively-distinct clinical-evidence tier — MSF manufactured-malnutrition documentation is among the strongest possible humanitarian-harm documentation (tier-5 independent clinical observation). Cross-cluster: Hungary ICC reversal signal applies as collateral evidence in Israel floor-conduct accountability category (and as positive INT credit in Hungary first-operational-baseline cycle, where it was credited).
open_actions_resolved: MSF manufactured-malnutrition report documented as new conduct-category event
Hungary ICC reversal documented as external INT-dimension accountability signal
open_actions_carried: Watch: any Israeli response to MSF report
Watch: any investigation/remedy on OHCHR 35-individual torture allegations cluster
Watch: UNRWA access block status (any change)
Watch: other ICC member-state enforcement posture shifts
Floor exit criteria require: cessation of aid restrictions + investigation of documented violations + cooperation with ICC/UN mechanisms — none in trajectory
disclaimer: This assessment is based on publicly available information and does not constitute a formal Compassion Benchmark Certified Assessment.
